signals.headline: Bitcoin Hits $78,194 on April 22, 2026 Amid Institutional ETF Surge and Regulatory Clarity | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Hits $78,194 on April 22, 2026 Amid Institutional ETF Surge and Regulatory Clarity | NO | HIGH confidence**

Bitcoin's price reached $78,194.37 at 9:15 a.m. ET on April 22, 2026, up $2,292 from the prior day, driven by record ETF inflows, corporate accumulation (e.g., MicroStrategy's 300,000+ BTC), and supply constraints from halving cycles[1][2]. This mid-April rally broke key resistance
